criteria_verification.evidence: agent.py defines _load_config() which opens the YAML file and parses it with yaml.safe_load(). Test test_load_config_uses_safe_load verifies safe_load is called via mock wrapping. Test test_agent_module_reads_config_yaml verifies the parsed config values are correct.
criteria_verification.notes: agent.py defines _load_config() which opens the YAML file and parses it with yaml.safe_load(). Test test_load_config_uses_safe_load verifies safe_load is called via mock wrapping. Test test_agent_module_reads_config_yaml verifies the parsed config values are correct.

criteria_verification.evidence: agent.py defines _load_domain_prompt() which reads domains/{domain}/DOMAIN.md using pathlib.Path.read_text(). DEFAULT_DOMAIN is set to 'example-domain'. Test test_load_domain_prompt_reads_file verifies file content is returned. Test test_load_domain_prompt_default_domain verifies the default domain name.

Test test_load_domain_prompt_reads_file verifies file content is returned. Test test_load_domain_prompt_default_domain verifies the default domain name.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `agent.py` calls `create_orchestrator()` with config values and domain prompt
criteria_verification.evidence: agent.py defines _build_agent() which extracts reasoning_model and implementation_model from config and passes them along with domain_prompt to create_orchestrator(). Test test_agent_module_calls_create_orchestrator verifies the exact call signature with mock. Test test_build_agent_passes_models_from_config verifies model values pass through correctly.
criteria_verification.notes: agent.py defines _build_agent() which extracts reasoning_model and implementation_model from config and passes them along with domain_prompt to create_orchestrator(). Test test_agent_module_calls_create_orchestrator verifies the exact call signature with mock. Test test_build_agent_passes_models_from_config verifies model values pass through correctly.

criteria_verification.evidence: agent.py has module-level code: agent = _build_agent(_config, _domain_prompt). This matches the langgraph.json reference './agent.py:agent'. Test test_agent_attribute_exists verifies the attribute exists on the module. Test test_langgraph_json_references_agent verifies langgraph.json points to ./agent.py:agent.
criteria_verification.notes: agent.py has module-level code: agent = _build_agent(_config, _domain_prompt). This matches the langgraph.json reference './agent.py:agent'. Test test_agent_attribute_exists verifies the attribute exists on the module. Test test_langgraph_json_references_agent verifies langgraph.json points to ./agent.py:agent.

criteria_verification.evidence: agent.py imports load_dotenv from dotenv and calls load_dotenv(dotenv_path=_PROJECT_ROOT / '.env', override=False) at module level before building the agent. Test test_load_dotenv_is_called verifies load_dotenv is called via mock patching and module reload.
criteria_verification.notes: agent.py imports load_dotenv from dotenv and calls load_dotenv(dotenv_path=_PROJECT_ROOT / '.env', override=False) at module level before building the agent. Test test_load_dotenv_is_called verifies load_dotenv is called via mock patching and module reload.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Graceful handling if `.env` or domain file is missing (with defaults)
criteria_verification.evidence: _load_config returns _DEFAULT_CONFIG when file is missing (FileNotFoundError), invalid YAML (YAMLError), missing orchestrator key, or non-dict orchestrator value. _load_domain_prompt returns _DEFAULT_DOMAIN_PROMPT when file is missing or has encoding errors. load_dotenv uses override=False which is a no-op if .env is absent. Tests: test_load_config_returns_defaults_when_file_missing, test_load_config_handles_invalid_yaml, test_load_config_no_orchestrator_key, test_load_config_orchestrator_not_dict, test_load_config_missing_model_keys, test_load_domain_prompt_returns_default_when_missing, test_load_domain_prompt_handles_encoding_error.
criteria_verification.notes: _load_config returns _DEFAULT_CONFIG when file is missing (FileNotFoundError), invalid YAML (YAMLError), missing orchestrator key, or non-dict orchestrator value. _load_domain_prompt returns _DEFAULT_DOMAIN_PROMPT when file is missing or has encoding errors. load_dotenv uses override=False which is a no-op if .env is absent. Tests: test_load_config_returns_defaults_when_file_missing, test_load_config_handles_invalid_yaml, test_load_config_no_orchestrator_key, test_load_config_orchestrator_not_dict, test_load_config_missing_model_keys, test_load_domain_prompt_returns_default_when_missing, test_load_domain_prompt_handles_encoding_error.
